channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I replayed Firewatch a decade on — and its storytelling is still some of the best I’ve ever experienced
item.description: We come back to the emotional storytelling of Firewatch a decade after release.

item.title: I breathed new life into my vinyl with Fluance's RT87 turntable and while setup was finicky, it's well worth it for seasoned record collectors
item.description: The Fluance RT87 sounds as great as it is finicky to set up — but then again, if you're a seasoned hi-fi tinkerer, you may actually enjoy the process…

item.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
item.description: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

item.title: Apple has banned home service content on upcoming Maps ads
item.description: The company may be trying to save ad space for local businesses.

item.title: Google might not kneecap the Pixel 11a with an old processor
item.description: Mystic Leaks suggests that the Pixel 11a will return to featuring a flagship-grade processor with the Tensor G6. Rather than the Tensor G5 found in the Pixel 10 and 10 Pro, the Pixel 10a shipped with the previous generation Tensor G4. That was a huge disappointment since, typically, the Pixel a lineup kept the modern […]

item.title: Le feuilleton Angell/Rebirth, le Royaume-Uni taxe les voiture électriques et Renault corrige la Twingo – le Récap’ Survoltés de la semaine
item.description: Le dossier Angell continue de s'épaissir avec un bras de fer financier qui laisse des milliers de clients dans le flou, le Royaume-Uni officialise une taxe au kilomètre pour les voitures électriques dès 2028, et Renault identifie enfin l'origine de la panne survenue sur une Twingo E-Tech pendant un essai presse. Voici notre récap' Survoltés de la semaine. ...

item.title: EV tech is trickling down to hybrid and combustion vehicles, and I’m here for it
item.description: Software updates aren't just for EVs anymore, as combustion and hybrids are seeing OTA updates that can help support new features and even recalls.

item.title: How to watch France vs England: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 third place play-off
item.description: Here's how to watch France vs England for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, with broadcast details, TV channels and kick-off time included.

item.title: ZA/UM announces layoffs two months after the launch of Zero Parades
item.description: Up to 32 employees were affected by the studio's recent decision.

item.title: À peine sortie, le nouvel écran incurvé gaming de Xiaomi (34″, 180 Hz) est déjà en promo
item.description: Le Xiaomi G34WQi est un écran incurvé de 34 pouces vendu pour moins de 300 euros. Il conviendra aux gamers compétitifs grâce à sa fréquence de 180 Hz et à son temps de réponse de 1 ms.
